description: Extract treatment phases, scheduled appointments, and milestones/assessments from a LaTeX treatment plan via regex and render a text timeline (matplotlib Gantt-style visual is optional).
rules: read-only: never modifies the input plan
text timeline is stdlib only; --visual mode needs matplotlib
usage: Set PLAN_FILE to a .tex treatment plan. Output: timeline.txt (text mode).
limitation: Only detects timeframes matching its patterns (Week N-M, Month N, POD N, Every N ...). The core exits non-zero if NO timeline items are detected; the porter still records the file. Visual PNG/PDF output requires matplotlib (absent here) and is not exercised by this perk's text path.
